meta.title: Accept package bookings - Practitioner
meta.description: Enable or disable package booking acceptance.

packageAvailability.title: Session packages
packageAvailability.description: Enable this option if you want to receive package bookings from patients.
packageAvailability.helper: When this option is off, patients cannot buy new packages with you, and existing packages or sessions will not be affected.

warning.title: You cannot enable packages right now

feedback.error: Could not save package settings right now. Please try again.
feedback.loadError: Could not load package settings. Please try again.
feedback.missingRequirements: You cannot enable packages before completing the required requirements.

meta.title: Dashboard â€” Practitioner
meta.description: Your practitioner overview, application status, and quick navigation.

page.title: Dashboard
page.subtitle: See what needs your attention now and keep your workspace ready.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your professional information and bio.

specialties.title: Specialties
specialties.description: Manage the specialties linked to your profile.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Upload credential references and track their review status.

application.title: Application
application.description: Check your application status and submit when ready.

requests.heading: Pending requests
requests.emptyNote: No pending instant booking requests right now.

sessions.heading: Upcoming sessions
sessions.emptyNote: Confirmed and upcoming sessions with patients will appear here.

notes.CONFIRMED: Scheduled and waiting for the join window to open.
notes.UPCOMING: Coming up soon. Review the session details if needed.
notes.READY_TO_JOIN: You can open the session room now.
notes.IN_PROGRESS: This session is already in progress.
notes.PENDING_PAYMENT: The session is waiting for patient payment.
notes.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: This session still needs your response.

links.heading: Quick access
links.primaryNote: These are the routes you are most likely to use during live work.
links.walletNote: Review your current balance and top-level finance summary.
links.ledgerNote: Inspect recent financial entries without leaving the practitioner area.
links.settlementsNote: Check settlement batches and their current visibility states.
links.careChatNote: Review approved and pending care-chat requests without switching to a general chat flow.
links.profileNote: Keep your profile accurate and patient-ready.
links.applicationNote: Track your approval state and readiness.
links.credentialsNote: Add credential references here and track whether they are pending, approved, rejected, or expired.
links.specialtiesNote: Manage the specialties linked to your profile and keep one marked as primary.

pendingRequests.heading: {count, plural, one {# booking request is waiting} other {# booking requests are waiting}}
pendingRequests.note: Respond quickly so patients do not lose their booking window.

readySessions.heading: {count, plural, one {# session can be opened now} other {# sessions can be opened now}}
readySessions.note: Joinable sessions should stay within easy reach while they are live.

pendingResponses.heading: {count, plural, one {# session still needs your response} other {# sessions still need your response}}
pendingResponses.note: Check the session details to confirm what should happen next.

clear.heading: No urgent runtime action right now
clear.note: Your immediate queue looks clear. Keep your availability and presence ready for new work.

readiness.heading: Runtime readiness
readiness.onlineInstant: You are online and open for instant booking right now.
readiness.online: You are online. Review instant booking if you want patients to book you immediately.
readiness.away: You are marked away, so check your status before upcoming work starts.
readiness.busy: You are marked busy. Switch back when you are ready to take live work.
readiness.offline: You are currently offline. Update your presence before opening instant availability.

feedback.loadError: Could not load your profile. Please try again.

feedback.error: Could not submit the profile change request right now.
feedback.success: Your profile change request was submitted successfully.
feedback.primarySpecialtyRequired: Select a primary specialty before submitting the request.

request.primarySpecialtyRequired: Select a primary specialty before submitting the request.
request.payoutAccountHolderRequired: Account holder name is required before submitting.
request.notice: Sensitive profile changes are not applied live until admin approves them.
request.modalDescription: Prepare the details below and send them for admin review before they go live.
request.noRequest: No review request has been submitted yet.
request.noChanges: No changes detected in this request.

statusMessage.SUBMITTED: The request has been submitted and is waiting for review.
statusMessage.APPROVED: The request was approved and is live.
statusMessage.UNDER_REVIEW: The request is currently under review.
statusMessage.DRAFT: This request is still a draft.

request.noRequestHint: Use the request flow to propose profile changes for admin approval.

feedback.removeError: Could not prepare the avatar removal request right now.
feedback.updateError: Could not prepare the avatar change request right now.

avatar.livePresent: A live avatar is already available on your profile.
avatar.note: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Large images are compressed before submission.
avatar.title: Avatar review
avatar.removeSelected: Selected avatar will be removed in this request.
avatar.liveEmpty: No live avatar is currently set.
avatar.pageHint: Preview a new avatar here. It is not included in this submission yet.
avatar.hintBody: Use this area to preview an avatar replacement or removal locally. Profile changes are submitted separately.

validation.invalidType: Only JPG, PNG, and WEBP images are supported.

validation.countryCodeMax: Country code must be 3 characters or less
validation.payoutAccountHolderNameMax: Account holder name must be 191 characters or less
validation.bioMax: Bio must be 4000 characters or less
validation.timezoneMax: Timezone must be 80 characters or less
validation.payoutDestinationRequired: Complete the payout details before submitting.
validation.payoutWalletProviderMax: Wallet provider must be 191 characters or less
validation.payoutBankAccountNumberMax: Bank account number must be 191 characters or less
validation.payoutOtherDetailsMax: Payout details must be 1000 characters or less
validation.professionalTitleMax: Professional title must be 191 characters or less
validation.yearsMin: Years of experience cannot be negative
validation.yearsMax: Years of experience seems too high
validation.payoutIbanMax: IBAN must be 191 characters or less
validation.displayNameMax: Display name must be 80 characters or less
validation.payoutWalletIdentifierMax: Wallet identifier must be 191 characters or less
validation.payoutBankNameMax: Bank name must be 191 characters or less
validation.sessionPriceInvalid: Enter a valid price greater than zero.

sections.liveProfileNote: This is the approved profile currently visible to patients.
sections.changeRequestNote: Draft your updates here and send them for admin review before they become live.

readiness.readyNote: Your current live profile looks ready to keep as-is.
readiness.notReadyNote: You have draft changes or missing details that still need admin review.

feedback.loadError: Could not load your profile. Please try again.
feedback.error: Could not save changes. Please try again.

summary.credentialsNote: {count, plural, one {# credential record is on file.} other {# credential records are on file.}}

meta.description: Review your live profile, prepare a change request, and submit updates for admin review.

displayName.placeholder: Your full name as shown to patients
displayName.label: Display name

bio.placeholder: Tell patients about your background and approach
bio.label: Bio

page.title: Professional profile
page.subtitle: Review the live profile shown to patients and submit changes for admin approval.

onboarding.otpRequiredNote: We cannot open the practitioner workspace before your account OTP is verified. Once verification is complete, the full practitioner dashboard will be available.

meta.title: Credentials â€” Practitioner
meta.description: View and manage your uploaded credentials.

page.title: Credentials
page.subtitle: Add credential references and track their current review state.

credentials.empty: Add your first credential reference so your professional record is easier to review.

management.heading: Credential references on your practitioner account
management.note: Use this screen to add credential metadata that is already stored through your active file workflow.
management.scopeNote: This surface supports adding new credential references and tracking review status. It does not manage file storage, replacement, or removal.

summary.heading: Credential summary
summary.readyNote: You already have credential records on file. Keep them current if your professional details change.
summary.missingNote: Your application readiness still needs at least one credential record.

form.heading: Add a credential reference
form.fileUrlHint: Enter the direct file URL or resolved storage reference used by your current file workflow.
form.scopeNote: Adding a new reference creates another credential record for review.
form.duplicateNote: The same credential type cannot be added twice with the same file reference.

validation.fileUrlRequired: Enter the file URL or storage reference before uploading.

feedback.loadError: Could not load credentials. Please try again.
feedback.loadErrorNote: Your credential records could not be loaded right now.
feedback.uploadSuccess: Your credential reference was added successfully.
feedback.uploadError: Could not upload your credential reference. Please try again.
feedback.duplicateError: This credential type already has the same file reference on your account.

meta.title: Specialties â€” Practitioner
meta.description: View and manage your linked specialties.

page.title: Specialties
page.subtitle: Review, update, and keep your linked specialties accurate.

specialties.empty: Choose at least one specialty to keep your practitioner profile ready.

management.heading: Specialties on your practitioner profile
management.note: Use this screen to update the specialties linked to your profile. Specialty records themselves are managed separately.
management.replaceHint: Saving replaces your full specialties list and keeps one specialty marked as primary.

catalog.heading: Add another specialty
catalog.categoryEmptyNote: Try another category to add a sub-specialty.
catalog.selectionNote: You can add only specialties that are currently active on Fayed.
catalog.primaryNote: One specialty always stays primary. If you remove the current primary, the first remaining specialty becomes primary.
catalog.noAvailableToAdd: All available specialties are already selected.
catalog.emptyTitle: No specialties are available right now
catalog.emptyNote: There are no active specialties to add at the moment.
catalog.loadErrorNote: Your current specialties are visible, but editing needs the active specialties list to load first.

validation.minOne: Choose at least one specialty before saving.

feedback.loadError: Could not load specialties. Please try again.
feedback.loadErrorNote: The specialties linked to your profile could not be loaded right now.
feedback.saveError: Could not save your specialties. Please try again.

meta.title: Availability â€” Practitioner
meta.description: Manage your weekly schedule and instant booking settings.

page.title: Availability
page.subtitle: Set your weekly schedule, manage exceptions, and control your presence.

feedback.loadError: Could not load your availability. Please try again.

presence.heading: Online presence
presence.description: Control your current status and instant booking availability.

instantBooking.label: Instant booking
instantBooking.description: Allow patients to book immediately without manual confirmation.
instantBooking.enabled: Patients can book you instantly right now.

presence.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

feedback.loadError: Could not load presence data. Please try again.

schedule.heading: Weekly schedule
schedule.description: Choose a day, then set 30-minute and 60-minute slots independently.
schedule.noTimezone: No timezone is set on your profile. Please update your timezone in Profile before setting your schedule.
schedule.saveHint: Saving will replace your entire weekly schedule.
schedule.saveError: Could not save schedule. Please try again.

validation.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.overlap: This slot overlaps with an existing one.

schedule.daySelectorHint: Pick the day you want to edit. You can clear only that day, then work on each duration separately.
schedule.timeGridHint: Tap a start time to add or remove a slot. The grid switches to hourly blocks in 60-minute mode.
schedule.selectedRangesHint: Review the selected day separately for 30-minute and 60-minute slots.
schedule.emptySelectedDay: No time has been selected for this day yet.

stats.currentDayHint: The day you are editing now
stats.dayBlocksHint: {count, plural, one {# selected range} other {# selected ranges}}
stats.weekBlocksHint: {count, plural, one {# saved range} other {# saved ranges}}
stats.saved: Your current draft matches the saved schedule.

schedule.durationHint: Choose whether the time block will represent a 30-minute or 60-minute session.
schedule.durationNote: New slots will use {duration}. The 30-minute and 60-minute schedules are independent.
schedule.independenceNote: Select one duration at a time, or switch between them whenever you need to edit a different schedule.

exceptions.heading: Temporary blocks
exceptions.description: Pause bookings for today, tomorrow, a full week, or any custom range without changing your weekly schedule.
exceptions.deleteError: Could not delete exception. Please try again.
exceptions.createError: Could not create exception. Please try again.

quick.heading: Quick actions
quick.note: Use one tap to pause bookings for the most common situations.
quick.todayNote: Pause all bookings for the current day.
quick.tomorrowNote: Pause all bookings for the next day.
quick.weekNote: Pause bookings for the next seven days.

active.heading: Active blocks
active.note: Remove a block anytime to bring the schedule back.
active.count: {count, plural, one {# active block} other {# active blocks}}

exceptions.customHint: Use a custom range when the quick options are not enough.

validation.datesRequired: Start and end date are required.

meta.title: Application â€” Practitioner
meta.description: Review your readiness and submit your practitioner application.

page.title: Application
page.subtitle: Review your readiness and track your application status.

statusMessage.SUBMITTED: Your application has been submitted and is awaiting review.
statusMessage.UNDER_REVIEW: Your application is being reviewed by the Fayed team. You will be notified of any updates.
statusMessage.APPROVED: Your application has been approved. You are now an active practitioner on Fayed.
statusMessage.ARCHIVED: This application has been archived and is no longer active.

submit.label: Submit application
submit.confirmHint: Once submitted, your application will be reviewed by the Fayed team.

feedback.loadError: Could not load application status. Please try again.
feedback.submitSuccess: Your application has been submitted successfully.
feedback.submitError: Could not submit application. Please try again.
